Display.multi_display: Simultaneous LCD and CRT, 180 degree tilt

memory.slots: 1 socket available (1 socket uses 16MB); 8MB on memory module with 2 SO-DIMM sockets
memory.features: 32MB standard; memory module under disk accessible by opening keyboard

display_options: 13.3" TFT XGA color 1024x768, 65,536 simultaneous colors, Black Matrix TFT, 100 to 1 contrast ratio

storage.hdd: 3.0 GB / 12 ms / DMA Mode 2 or PIO Mode 4, EIDE, busmaster, PCI 2.1, supports two internal disks, SMART
storage.optical: None standard (upgradeable to 4x, 6x, or 8x CD-ROM via UltraBay)

ports: 2 x Type I/II or 1 x Type III PCMCIA (CardBus 32-bit PCI)
Infrared ports (front and back) with IrDA 1.0, up to 115 kbs
audio: 16-bit audio chip, 20 voice MIDI FM synthesis (ESS1688)
Internal stereo speakers (0.5W), slide volume control, internal microphone
keyboard: Full-size 85-key keyboard, automated tilt up (5.5 degrees)
security: Security latch for keyboard and DIMMs
system: Windows 95 OSR2 (FAT16, C: 1.99 GB, D: 885 MB)
